transcription.text: It's Kenner's Betty Crocker Easy-Bake Mini-Wave Oven. Preheat 15 minutes, light bulb not included. You can mix up a yellow and a chocolate cake. You can have lots done just right. The Betty Crocker Easy-Bake Mini-Wave Oven with Betty Crocker Mixes from Kenner.
